meaning: queen's rook's pawn (国际象棋中的)后翼车行兵
examples: Questionable research practices (QRP) is grey area in scientific research which is between responsible conduct in research and misconduct in research.
Single Operator QRP (all Band or Single Band) : One person performs all of the operating and logging functions. QSO alerting assistance is not permitted. Total output power must not exceed 5 watts.
